title: Exchange Online configuration
description: Source of truth for the tenant's Exchange Online settings managed as code. Applied idempotently by scripts/deploy-exchange.ps1 via the Deploy Exchange Online Config workflow. Only the settings declared here are reconciled; anything not listed is left untouched (unlike the DNS pruner, this is additive — it never disables an unlisted domain).

organization.description: The tenant's primary .onmicrosoft.com domain, passed to Connect-ExchangeOnline -Organization.

dkim.description: Desired DKIM signing state per accepted domain. A config is created if missing (disabled), then its Enabled flag is reconciled to match. Enabling requires the selector CNAMEs to already resolve (see dns/records.platform.json); until then the domain stays pending and is retried on the next run.

domain.description: Accepted domain to sign, e.g. kscloud.io

enabled.description: Whether DKIM signing should be enabled for the domain
